scenario: Airfield generated placements - skipFlatSearch branch selection after gating by zone
note: Perimeter zone entries now push placements with skipFlatSearch: false, routing through WorldFeatureSystem.resolveTerrainPlacement 9-point footprint solver. Interior zones (runway_side, dispersal) retain the centroid-Y fast path since they sit on or near the flat apron stamp. Verified by Vitest 'perimeter structures opt in to the footprint solver while interior structures keep the flat-snap fast path'.

footprintSolver.foundationClearanceBudget: < 0.3 m at all four corners, achieved when heightSpan <= WORLD_FEATURE_FLAT_SPAN_TARGET (0.7 m) because groundedY = meanHeight + min(heightSpan * 0.15, 0.18)

tests: AirfieldLayoutGenerator > us_airbase template > perimeter structures opt in to the footprint solver while interior structures keep the flat-snap fast path
